use_cases: Primary action trigger for forms and dialogs
Icon-only buttons for compact UI interfaces
Destructive actions with visual warning states
Disabled button states for conditional interactions
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for asChild composition and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Features standard accessibility attributes including focus-visible ring and disabled states. Standard shadcn/ui design system component.
